title: lysipomia brachysiphonia var. brevifolia
intro:
Lysipomia brachysiphonia var. brevifolia is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is also known as the 'Tepuztecatl' or 'Mexican morning glory', named after the Aztec god of the morning star. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lysipomia brachysiphonia var. brevifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. 

However, I was unable to confirm herbal preparations for this plant.
